_comment: EXAMPLE per-device preset override. Copy to devices/<type>/presets.json (drop the .example) and keep ONLY the values your device wants different from the platform defaults in os/hal/presets.py. Every section is optional. Each entry patches the matching base entry field-by-field — only the fields you list change; the rest stay at the default. Naming a preset that does not exist (a typo) fails loud at HAL boot. Overrides only take effect for routes the device mounts: emotion needs the `expression` capability, scene needs `light`, aim needs `motion`. HAL-only — the Go OS core does not read this file. See devices/lamp/docs/led-control.md.
